sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88544" key="prosanakaqi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-καθίζω</orth>, <sense id="n88544.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sit up straighter</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
